payload.answer: The new memory may supersede the existing one: the existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe options are: approve_supersession to treat the new memory as replacing the old job fact, keep_both if both should remain because the situation is ambiguous or time-scoped, reject_new if the new memory is incorrect, or edit to clarify wording, dates, or identities before saving.
